name: Yoinks
description: Paste a public media link, pick a format, download with yt-dlp (single-extract merge), save to Photos or Files. YouTube cookie login supported.

localizedDescriptions.en: Paste a public media link, pick a format, download with yt-dlp (single-extract merge), save to Photos or Files. YouTube cookie login supported.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 粘贴公开媒体链接，选择格式后用 yt-dlp 一次拉取合并下载，保存到相册或文件。支持 YouTube Cookie 登录。
